heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
label: 956, 957 Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
notes: Section 956, , , related to detail of military and naval personnel as inspectors or supervisors of buildings, or as couriers. See , Armed Forces.act Aug. 13, 1946, ch. 957, title V, § 56160 Stat. 1011section 713 of Title 10

Section 957, , , authorized the Secretary of the Navy to assign enlisted men of the Navy and Marine Corps to serve as custodians at an embassy, legation, or consulate. See , Armed Forces.act Aug. 13, 1946, ch. 957, title V, § 56260 Stat. 1011section 5983 of Title 10
amendments: Section 956, , , related to detail of military and naval personnel as inspectors or supervisors of buildings, or as couriers. See , Armed Forces.act Aug. 13, 1946, ch. 957, title V, § 56160 Stat. 1011section 713 of Title 10

Section 957, , , authorized the Secretary of the Navy to assign enlisted men of the Navy and Marine Corps to serve as custodians at an embassy, legation, or consulate. See , Armed Forces.act Aug. 13, 1946, ch. 957, title V, § 56260 Stat. 1011section 5983 of Title 10
